title: bromus hordeaceus subvar. microstachys
intro: Bromus hordeaceus subvar. microstachys, also known as small spike brome, is a type of wild grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Bromus hordeaceus subvar. microstachys include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the dried flowers and leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
